bullets: Built and maintained user-facing web applications using React and TypeScript.
Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders to ship product improvements on tight timelines.
Improved application performance by identifying and resolving frontend bottlenecks.
Contributed to API integrations and backend features for core user workflows.
Delivered responsive interfaces for customer-facing products.
Worked closely with designers and product managers to refine UX details.
Implemented reusable components that improved development speed across projects.
Supported production releases and addressed critical bugs.
Focused on software engineering and web technologies.
Completed projects involving full-stack application development.
Built a strong foundation in algorithms, data structures, and systems design.
Worked on collaborative course projects with peer teams.
Studied mathematics and science with a strong academic record.
Participated in technical and extracurricular activities.
Developed early interest in computing and problem solving.
